positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast vector illustration of a magical, bioluminescent forest floor scene. The central focus features giant, stylized fungi and overgrown mystical flora casting an ethereal, cool glow. The color palette is dominated by deep midnight indigo, velvety teal, and electric cyan neon luminescence. The composition should feel intricate and repeating, incorporating sharp, clean silhouettes and geometric patterns within the natural elements. The style must evoke elegant, detailed tattoo art or high-end screen print graphics, ensuring crisp lines and strong contrast against a deep black background.
